title: RefundLine
description: Per-invoice-line refund detail. Supports partial refunds where only some invoice lines are reversed. Freezes proration_config for period-based refunds. IMMUTABLE at creation — corrections require cancelling the parent refund + creating a new one. Carries `tenant_id` — cascades application through tenant per hierarchy.md §2. NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, `scope_node_id`.

x-eloquent.no_soft_deletes: true - RefundLine is 7y-retained HARD as a pivot row. Cascade delete only via parent refund purge.

refund_id.description: Parent refund. CASCADE — refund lines co-terminous with parent.

invoice_line_id.description: The invoice line being refunded. RESTRICT — invoice line cannot be deleted while refund_lines reference it.

amount_cents.description: Portion of this invoice line being refunded. Must be <= invoice_line.total_cents - invoice_line.amount_refunded_cents.

proration_config.description: Frozen unused_period + pass_credit config for period-based refunds. Required when parent refund.refund_type='prorated'; NULL for full/partial refunds. Shape: { unused_period_start, unused_period_end, total_period_days, unused_days, unused_pass_count, unused_pass_credit_cents, used_pass_count?, used_pass_penalty_cents?, billing_interval, formula_schema_version }. IMMUTABLE post-create.

reason_note.description: Line-specific customer-visible note. Different from parent refund.reason_note (which is refund-wide).

x-invariants: amount_cents > 0 AND amount_cents <= invoice_line.total_cents - invoice_line.amount_refunded_cents (checked at observer time)
currency matches parent refund.currency AND invoice_line.currency (three-way match)
parent refund.invoice_id == invoice_line.invoice_id (cross-invoice guard — refund_line's invoice_line must belong to the parent refund's invoice)
proration_config populated iff parent refund.refund_type='prorated' (REFUND_LINE_PRORATION_CONFIG_MISUSE otherwise)
billing_interval='one_time' in proration_config is invalid (REFUND_LINE_INVALID_PRORATION_CONFIG — one-time purchases don't proration)
composite unique (tenant_id, refund_id, invoice_line_id) — a single refund cannot double-refund the same invoice line
IMMUTABLE post-create (REFUND_LINE_IMMUTABLE) — cannot mutate any field; corrections require cancelling the parent refund + creating a new one
SUM of refund_lines.amount_cents across all lines of a parent refund == parent refund.amount_cents (invariant enforced at observer + at final-line creation)
parent refund.status must be IN ('pending', 'awaiting_approval', 'approved') at refund_line creation (REFUND_LINE_PARENT_LOCKED past that)
